channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bus stop shelter needed urgently, 5th June
item.description:
I am concerned about the bus stop by Chatsworth drive. Why do we not have a shelter to protect the waiting public from the continuous falling branches from the overgrown tree above. Why do some stops have a shelter and others don’t?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Liddington Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wobbly raised paving slab, 5th June
item.description:
Paving slab between hsbc and lush is raised and wobbly and I’ve witnessed multiple people tripping and falling on it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Promenade, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rattling/loose manhole cover, 5th June
item.description:
Manhole cover near lamp post 82 / 100a Gloucester Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 57, Gloucester Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 5th June

item.title: This has worsen since this photo and won’t take much more fir it to cone down Along with an oak tree onto the lane and block our access but could injure if fell on anyone, 5th June
item.description:
Turn into sandy pluck lane Gl514ub . Just before the cottage daffodils on your right this treeis on your left just before

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandy Pluck Lane, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Giant hogweed, 5th June
item.description:
There is a giant hogweed growing in the small layby where the houses opposite park their cars. Hyde Lane, just before the railway bridge, heading into Swindon Village
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Hyde Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 slaps unstable on path that leads to drive, 5th June
item.description:
2 slaps on pavement are loose which lead to drives of 5 and 4 Arle close Have to drive over these to get into drives . They rock when you drive over them
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Arle Close, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several potholes at top end of road nearest Arle road, 5th June
item.description:
1 pothole on manhole cover at top of road near Arle road 2 potholes just a idt further down the road from the manhole on either side of the middle of carriageway 1 further pothole on side of road on right hand side w coming from Arle road before you get to first bungalow cars normally parked opposite so no alternative to going down it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Arle Close, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
